title: phyllanthus cristalensis
intro: Phyllanthus cristalensis, also known as Chennaparai, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including liver and kidney diseases, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cristalensis include improving liver function, reducing oxidative stress, and protecting against liver damage, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. Phyllanthus cristalensis is typically prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, diarrhea, and other ailments.
